---
name: Documentation
about: Report issues or suggest improvements to documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## Documentation Issue

### Type

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Suggested improvement

### Location

Which document or section is affected?

- **File:** [e.g., README.md, TESTING.md, docs/community/COMMUNITY_API.md]
- **Section:** [e.g., "Quick Start", "Environment Variables"]

### Description

Describe the issue or suggested improvement.

### Suggested Change

If applicable, provide the corrected or improved content.
